introduction.title: Getting to Pilani
details: Pilani is located in rural Rajasthan.
Not directly connected by air or train.

routes.title: From Delhi
routes.details: 5–6 hour bus journey from ISBT Kashmere Gate or Dhaula Kuan. Alternatively, take a train to Loharu Junction (LHU) followed by a cab.

routes.title: From Jaipur
routes.details: 4–5 hour bus journey from Sindhi Camp Bus Stand.

tips: Prepare for summer weather (sunscreen, caps, light clothing).
